missions.title: Gate Guardians
missions.task: Find the main entrance to Hal 12. Your entire team must form a human archway at the doors - arms linked overhead like a gate. Someone must walk through the arch. Photo proof. The more dramatic the walk-through, the better.
missions.scan_hint: On the pillar to the right of the main entrance doors
missions.next_hint: Race to the colorful shipping containers. Find the green container near the seating area.
missions.hint: The right-hand concrete pillar at Hal 12 entrance. QR at shoulder height on the side facing AWAY from the doors.

missions.title: Container Quest
missions.task: Race to the colorful shipping containers. Each team member must find a DIFFERENT colored container and pose like they own a shop there. What does your container sell? Name your business. Group photo with everyone in front of their container.
missions.scan_hint: Behind the green container near the seating area
missions.next_hint: Head to the planted rain gardens. Find the largest planter box with tall grasses.
missions.hint: It's the emerald-green container at the south end - not the blue one. Go around back. QR taped to metal at knee height near corner closest to wooden benches.

missions.title: The Green Labyrinth
missions.task: Find the planted rain gardens and winding paths in the green zone. Your team must navigate the paths blindfolded - one person guides, the rest follow with eyes closed (or hands over eyes). Record a 15-second video. The guide must use only absurd directions ('two penguin steps left, now waddle forward').
missions.scan_hint: Under the largest planter box in the rain garden
missions.next_hint: Run to the tunnel under the railway tracks. Check the midpoint where it bends.
missions.hint: The long rectangular planter with tall grasses - not the round ones. Lie on your back and look up at underside of wooden rim. QR on inner lip, about a meter from left end.

missions.title: Tunnel Symphony
missions.task: Find the long tunnel under the tracks. Your team must create a spontaneous song about Klaudusia using the tunnel's natural echo. Clap, stomp, sing, beatbox - use the acoustics. Record 20 seconds. Bonus if strangers join in.
missions.scan_hint: In the middle of the tunnel, on the wall at the bend
missions.next_hint: Find the art walk / sculpture path. Look for the twisted metal sculpture.
missions.hint: Walk to midpoint of tunnel where it curves slightly. QR on left wall (walking toward green area), tucked into small recess between two concrete panels, about chest height.

missions.title: Shadow Detectives
missions.task: Find an art installation or sculpture that casts an interesting shadow. Your team must become part of the shadow - arrange yourselves so your shadows merge with the art's shadow to create a NEW creature or shape. Photo from above if possible. Name your shadow creature.
missions.scan_hint: At the base of the twisted metal sculpture along the art path
missions.next_hint: Go to the open plaza / gathering area. Check under the curved wooden bench.
missions.hint: The twisted copper/steel sculpture that looks like a spiral - not the stone carvings. Crouch at the base on north side. QR tucked into gap between two metal plates just above ground.

missions.title: The Mixtape
missions.task: Your team is producing Klaudusia's birthday mixtape. Assign each team member a music genre (opera, rap, country, death metal, lullaby). Take turns singing Happy Birthday in your assigned style. Film the entire performance. The transitions are everything.
missions.scan_hint: Under the bench closest to the open plaza center
missions.next_hint: Find the community garden or seating nook. Check behind the small notice board.
missions.hint: The curved wooden bench facing the plaza - not the straight ones near the wall. Reach underneath from FRONT side. QR stuck to underside of seating plank, about 40cm from right end.

missions.title: Message in a Bottle
missions.task: As a team, compose a one-sentence wish for Klaudusia's next year. It must rhyme. Write it on anything you can find (leaf, receipt, napkin, phone screen). Take a photo of your message with all team hands holding it up. Best rhyme wins bragging rights.
missions.scan_hint: Behind the community notice board near the garden
missions.next_hint: Sprint to the Rabalder Park skate area. Check under the lip of the big bowl.
missions.hint: The small notice board on the wooden post - not the big one in the main square. Reach behind the board from the top. QR taped flat against the back, facing downward.

missions.title: Skate Bowl Pose
missions.task: Find the concrete skate bowls at Rabalder Park. Your entire team must strike a synchronized skater pose on the edge of a ramp. Action shot required - everyone off the ground? Legendary bonus.
missions.scan_hint: Under the lip of the biggest concrete bowl
missions.next_hint: Race to the old concrete factory walls. Look low near the colorful mural corner.
missions.hint: The deepest bowl, closest to the fence. QR tucked into the seam where concrete lip meets the metal coping - reach underneath from the outside edge.

missions.title: Factory Face-Off
missions.task: Race to the old concrete walls. Find the wildest piece of graffiti or mural. Recreate it with your bodies - same poses, same expressions. Take a side-by-side photo. First team to post it wins bragging rights.
missions.scan_hint: Low on the wall near the colorful mural corner
missions.next_hint: Final destination! Go to the gathering spot. Find the QR under the main table.
missions.hint: Face the big psychedelic owl mural. Walk 3 meters to the left. QR at shin height on the concrete pillar - you'll need to crouch.

missions.title: The Final Toast
missions.task: Create a human pyramid or tower with your entire team. Every team member must be touching at least two others. Hold it for 5 seconds. Photo required - this is your victory shot. Then find the Gamemaster and present your team for the final score!
missions.scan_hint: Under the final meeting table near the gathering point
missions.next_hint: All missions complete! Race back to the admin to check the final leaderboard!
missions.hint: Look under the main table where people gather. QR is on the UNDERSIDE of the table - duck under and look up. It's near the center, not the edges.
